---
title: "Research"
---

> Of course, it is the paradoxes and unusual results that lead to abandonment of ideas, adjustment of our intuition or the discovery of new ideas
> 
> -- Leon Cohen

<br>

Research in Bayesian methods, semi-parametric modeling, and applied machine learning. Browse [Publications](publications.qmd), [Patents](patents.qmd), [Reports](reports.qmd), [Code](code.qmd), [Projects](projects/index.qmd), and [Team](team.qmd).
